title: Opentrons HTTP API Spec
agent_notes: Official OpenAPI-rendered HTTP API reference for Opentrons robots. This pack selects protocol analysis and run inspection surfaces only.

title: Opentrons Python Protocol API
agent_notes: Documents protocol scripts and robot-control capabilities; source-pack rows must not imply live robot execution.

title: Opentrons App protocol import and analysis
agent_notes: Official app docs state imported protocols are analyzed into robot commands and analysis can fail before a protocol is ready.

title: Opentrons HTTP API beta upload response example
agent_notes: Official Opentrons beta HTTP API README includes a concrete protocol upload response excerpt with required pipettes, labware, modules, metadata, and protocol IDs. Treat as concrete documentation evidence, not a live probe.
